title: Gorgt
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Gorgt''' [[Tree/Legends|trees]] were [[Plant/Legends|plants]] that grew on the [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] [[Planet/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Gamorr/Legends|Gamorr]]. They were favored by the Gamorreans for the dense thick timber they provided. The [[Wood/Legends|wood]] was used to manufacture the handle of the [[thogk]], a traditional Gamorrean club.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-04-XX -->''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''
